During the [[Mandalorian Civil War (True Mandalorians)|Mandalorian Civil War]], the [[True Mandalorians]] made use of a large '''carrier''' to transport [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[52 BBY/Legends|52 BBY]], the carrier was used to deliver the True Mandalorian [[Army/Legends|army]] and several [[Meteor-class Q-Carrier|''Meteor''-class Q-Carriers]] to the [[Korda system/Legends|Korda system]], where the Mandalorians had been [[Mercenary/Legends|contracted]] to extract a local [[Korda Defense Force|defense force]] under [[Kordan|hostile]] [[Lightfight|fire]]. Under the direction of [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Jaster Mereel]], the True Mandalorians planned for the extraction in a meeting hall on board the carrier. Upon arriving in the Korda [[Star system/Legends|system]], the carrier entered [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over [[Korda Six]], and the True Mandalorians launched from several [[Hangar/Legends|hangar bays]] along the outside of the carrier aboard their ''Meteor''-class [[Dropship/Legends|dropships]], descending toward the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface below.<ref name="OpenSeasons2" />

==Characteristics==
The True Mandalorians' vessel possessed a number of hangar bays of various sizes along its sides, where Q-Carriers could disembark for each mission. At least eight of these ''Meteor''-class dropships could be made to fit comfortably within the larger carrier, along with up to three [[Company/Legends|companies]] of embarked [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. The carrier itself was armed with multiple twin-barreled turrets, mounted along the sides of the ship.<ref name="OpenSeasons2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The True Mandalorians' carrier vessel first appeared in the [[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Jango Fett: Open Seasons|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by author [[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]] and published [[June 17]], [[2002]]. Neither the carrier nor its class were named in the comic.

==Appearances==
*[[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 2|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 2]] {{Flash}}
